criteriaChecklist.criterion: Deploy Soroban grant manager on Testnet
criteriaChecklist.reason: Contract IDs and initialize scripts present; README documents live Testnet IDs.
README and verification UI reference Freighter signing steps.

executiveSummary: Evidence supports completion of stated milestone criteria with coherent architecture and measurable tests.
technicalFindings: Milestone criteria map to files and flows in the repository.
Commit history shows iterative work rather than a single dump.
architectureReview: Clear FE/BE/chain separation with escrow state on-chain and AI off-chain.
securityFindings: No private keys observed in sampled source.
User signing via Freighter reduces custodial risk.
documentationReview: README covers run, deploy, and network configuration adequately.
testingReview: Contract unit tests and CI-oriented scripts are present.
githubAnalysis: Steady commits and PRs aligned with the milestone window.
weaknesses: Deployment evidence is documentation-backed; live URL not independently probed
recommendations: Keep CI green before next payout milestone
reviewerNotes: Advisory APPROVE — human must still sign release.
